description: Executed TASK-NEXT-FROM-BASELINE-0001 Universal Executor/Auditor Exchange Ledger Loop implementation as roadmap step 10. Created governance/ledger-exchange-protocol.md on main branch establishing traceable loop mechanism for executor-auditor coordination: (1) Ledger-based exchange protocol defining structured communication between executors and auditors through ledger entries; (2) Loop integrity validation ensuring all ACTION_COMPLETED events receive corresponding VERIFICATION_REQUIRED responses; (3) Exchange state tracking mechanism maintaining executor-auditor coordination state across task lifecycles; (4) Protocol compliance validation ensuring all ledger entries follow schema v164 with proper parent_event_id chains; (5) Autonomous loop closure detection preventing orphaned executor actions without auditor verification. Exchange protocol enables traceable executor-auditor coordination while maintaining autonomous operation discipline through structured ledger-based communication loops.
